kimi.description: Kimi K2 - Moonshot AI's flagship coding model
Kimi K2 Thinking - Extended reasoning model
Kimi K2.5 - Native multimodal agentic model with text, image, and video input; supports thinking and non-thinking modes
Kimi K2.6 - Native multimodal agentic model with stronger long-horizon agentic coding, long-context reasoning, and preserved thinking support
Kimi K2.7 Code - Moonshot AI's latest coding-focused model
Kimi K2.7 Code HighSpeed - Same capabilities as Kimi K2.7 Code with higher output speed (~180 tokens/s)
